The ideal proportion between the mesiodistal width and height of the maxillary canines should be assessed using established norms important for diagnosis and treatment planning purposes. Commonly referenced values suggest an approximate relationship around “8:10” but specific details regarding exact heights versus widths need further clarification since no precise figures were mentioned here initially."
